overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, transitioning to driving on an elevated highway. The scene features massive holographic advertisements, neon-lit skyscrapers, and dense atmospheric haze typical of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The clip begins with a holographic koi fish swimming overhead, moves through a covered pedestrian plaza with illuminated flooring, and ends with high-speed highway driving through a canyon of digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated transit overpass

events.description: holographic koi fish swims overhead from left to right and exits the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily on reflective pedestrian walkway beneath the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: large translucent blue holographic fish swimming in the air above the street
curved concrete and metal highway structure overhead with integrated lighting
wet-look reflective pavement mirroring the neon lights from surrounding buildings
tall buildings covered in glowing neon signage and illuminated windows
massive vertical array of digital advertisements and animated commercials

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a massive holographic koi fish swimming overhead in a futuristic city. The camera walks forward under an elevated highway overpass on a reflective pedestrian plaza, surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers and digital billboards. The holographic fish exits the frame as the walk continues deeper under the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with illuminated flooring approaching highway overlook

events.description: approaching the edge of the overpass, view opens to reveal the highway canyon with dense digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking under the curved overpass structure with illuminated floor panels toward the highway edge overlook

entered.detail: square light panels embedded in the ground creating a checkered illumination pattern
dense corridor of towering buildings covered in massive animated digital advertisements
large red neon corporate logo sign mounted on building facade
concrete barrier and railing marking the edge of the pedestrian area above the highway

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper under the overpass, the ground features illuminated square panels. The scene transitions as the camera approaches the edge of the covered area, revealing a stunning view of a canyon-like street lined with massive digital billboards. The Petrochem neon sign becomes visible on the right as the highway overlook ledge comes into view.

events.description: transition from walking to driving, entering vehicle and merging onto the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: transitioning from pedestrian walkway onto elevated highway and accelerating into traffic flow

entered.detail: metal safety barriers lining the left edge of the elevated highway
bright yellow painted lines dividing the highway lanes
futuristic cars and trucks driving in adjacent lanes on the highway

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts from walking to driving as the camera enters a vehicle and merges onto the elevated highway. The scene opens up to a wide asphalt road with yellow lane markings, surrounded by guardrails and other vehicles. The digital billboard canyon now surrounds the driver on both sides as the speed increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane elevated highway through dense urban canyon

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right across the highway canyon
atmospheric haze increases significantly, reducing visibility of distant buildings

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed through dense highway traffic in the neon-lit city canyon

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle passing overhead from left to right above the highway traffic

entered.detail: thick fog and atmospheric perspective obscuring the distant ends of the street canyon

segments.scene_description: Driving at high speed through dense traffic on the elevated highway, surrounded by towering walls of digital billboards. A flying vehicle suddenly passes overhead from left to right. As the drive continues, atmospheric haze increases, creating a moody, obscured view of the distant city while neon lights reflect off the wet road surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins as a pedestrian walk through a neon-lit plaza and transforms into a high-speed drive along an elevated highway. It begins beneath a massive holographic koi fish swimming overhead, moving forward across a reflective pedestrian plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers and digital billboards. As the camera advances deeper under an overpass across illuminated floor panels, the view opens up to reveal a canyon-like street dominated by a glowing Petrochem sign. The perspective then shifts seamlessly from walking to driving as the camera merges onto a wide asphalt highway, accelerating through a corridor of digital billboards and dense traffic. Finally, the scene becomes increasingly atmospheric as a flying vehicle streaks overhead and a thick haze descends, blurring the distant city while neon lights shimmer on the wet road surface.
